# Introduction
This report summarizes input data (either user uploaded or based on open source defaults) and the resulting
analyses driven by the Safer Streets Priority Finder tool. For more information on the tool, including
methodology and FAQs, please visit https://sspf.tooledesign.com.

## Study Area Overview
```{python}
# | echo: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from report_utils import map_utils
from report_utils.render_guard import render_guard
from src.global_vars import BoundaryStyle
import contextily as cx


MAP_FIG_SIZE = (16, 12)

with render_guard("Study area map could not be rendered."):
    STUDY_AREA_GDF = map_utils.get_study_area_gdf(study_id)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=MAP_FIG_SIZE)
    style = BoundaryStyle()
    map_utils._plot_study_area(ax, STUDY_AREA_GDF.to_crs("EPSG:3857"), style)
    map_utils.pad_axes_to_ratio(ax, target_ratio=4 / 3, pad_fraction=0.05)
    cx.add_basemap(ax, source=cx.providers.CartoDB.DarkMatter, attribution=False)
    ax.set_axis_off()

    plt.show()
```
